name: xf_cep_not_order_mixed_initial
comment: GRADUATED D-146 (was the D-145 FENCED witness): mixed-regime `not E0() P()` — initial P's on BOTH sides of the blocker ([P1, E0, P2]). Order [3,2,1]: within a segment, epoch-inserts fire first, then updates, then the POST-BLOCKER EPOCH-0 INITIALS as the last-class tail (P2 behind the epoch insert P3), initial-before-blocker segment last. Enforced by the D-146 `seg_order_key` class extension; spec = tools/model_check_notorder_b.py MODEL=seg2 (0-div on ~5150 scenarios incl. the D-143 reduction). See DECISIONS D-145/D-146.
drl: rule NE when not E0() P() then end
